docs.title: Welcome to the FAQ!
docs.text:
This is a website dedicated to streamline assistance without the need of having to ask.

You can search on the website in the top right corner and you can also search the page with: CTRL + F

  • Interactable buttons

  • Search function

docs.title: Credits
docs.text:
• Jade Ink

    Thanks to Jade Ink for simplifying and enhancing portions of the document.

docs.title: Agathions
docs.text:
Warning

They are cosmetics only, they do not provide any bonuses and don't pick up things for you.

  • Phoenix Agathion

  • Flower Fairy Spirit Agathion

  • Pegasus Agathion

  • Utanka Agathion

docs.title: Cloaks
docs.text:
To turn off cloaks: Go into Gameplay Settings and Do not show cloaks.

  • Cloaks can look narrower on female characters.
  • All shown suits work with cloaks at the moment.
  • Cloaks might change hairstyle.

Holy Spirit Cloak

  • Holy Spirit is Green on Robe type armors.
  • Wearing a Costume makes it blue on Robe type.

Warning

They are cosmetics only, they do not provide any bonuses.

docs.title: Hats
docs.text:
All hats on head occupy 2 slots.

You can also look at some hats here for specific races: https://www.ivory-tower.de/

Warning

They are cosmetics only, they do not provide any bonuses.

  • Hats 1 Warrior Helmet, Wifi Helmet, Buff Helmet, Afro Hair, Ribbon Hairband, Top Hat

  • Hats 2 Flavorful Cheese Hat, Silver Kamaloka Circlet, Medieval Party Mask, Assassins Bamboo Hat, Bronze Kamaloka Circlet, Straw Hat

  • Hats 3 Silver Feathered Chapeau, Ruthless Mask, Refined Devil Horn, Gold Rimmed Glasses, Napoleon Hat, Pirate King Hat

  • Hats 4 Refined Angel Ring, Ketra Circlet, Chic Gold Horn Cap, Gold Kamaloka Circlet, Varka Circlet, Chic Silver Horn Cap

  • Hats 5 Refined Dagger Cap, Refined Medieval Party Mask, Refined Carnival Circlet, Refined Black Feather Mask, Refined Jester Hat, Refined Wizard Hat

  • Hats 6 Refined Romantic Chapeau, Silver Circlet, Rabbit Ears, Refined Pirate Hat, Gold Circlet, Pirate Hat

  • Hats 7 Angel Halo, First Mates Hat, Leather Cap, Half Face Mask, Romantic's Chapeau, Dagger Cap

  • Hats 8 Butterfly Hairpin, Black Half Mask, Black Feather Mask, Wizard Hat, Jester Hat, Piggy Hat

  • Hats 9 Teddy Bear Hat, Diadem, Mask of Spirits, Artisans Goggles, Dandy's Chapeau, Daisy Hairpin

  • Hats 10 Fairy Antennae, Little Angel Wing, Demon Horns, Forget-Me-Not Hairpin, Lady's Hairpin, Pirate's Eyepatch

  • Hats 11 Cat Ears, Racoon Ears, Gran Kain's Black Mask, Maidens Hairpin

docs.title: Important Notes
docs.text:
Cosmetics Info

  • No stat bonuses: Cosmetics are purely aesthetic.
  • Preview not available: Due to L2OFF file limits, you cannot test cosmetics on your character before purchasing. Eternal players can use the command: .trycosmetic!
  • Do not trade Reborn Store bought cosmetics or Reborn Coins: this includes as RMT and highly forbidden.

docs.title: How to Buy Coins
docs.text: Exchange Rate: 1 Coin = 1 € Purchase Link: Buy Coins Here

docs.title: Donation Guidelines
docs.text:
1. Send coins to the correct target:
    • Specify the server, account, and character name.
  2. Payment issues? Open a support ticket with:
    • Payment Method: Credit Card / FreeKassa / Crypto
    • Transaction Details:
      • Transaction ID (and Hash for crypto payments)
      • Email used
      • Time & Date of payment
      • Full donation description (e.g., "Purchased Bounty Hunter items for character 'Bob'")

docs.title: Common Mistakes
docs.text:
• Incorrect server/character details → open a support ticket.
  • Missing transaction info → delays in resolving issues.

docs.title: Hide Cosmetics
docs.text:
• To turn off suits: .visualequip

  • To turn off cloaks: Go into Gameplay Settings and Do not show cloaks.

docs.title: Payment Methods
docs.text:
Paypal is not available, you can pay with (here):

  • Card (Stripe)
  • Card / Crypto (FreeKassa.ru)

docs.title: Hair & Color / Face Change
docs.text:
You can either buy it from the Website's Shop or buy it from Dawn/Dusk Priest for 24k Ancient Adena each.

Images

docs.title: 1 Year Package VIP
docs.text:
The Package includes:

  • 365 days VIP Rune

  • a Title Color item that allows you to change your title color as many times as you want

  • an Accessory Coupon that you can exchange in Maria's shop for a hair accessory of your choice

  • and two Unique Cloak Skins, Radiant Light and Cold Darkness.

(Costs: 89 Balance)

docs.title: Suits
docs.text:
To turn off cosmetics: .visualequip

To equip suits, you need to go to your skills (ALT + K) and activate the toggle.

Warning

They are cosmetics only, they do not provide any bonuses.

  • Freya Suit

  • Kelbim Suit

  • Military Suit Comes with two options: Without or with a hat.

  • Rock Suit

  • Dark Knight Suit

  • Ninja Suit

  • Blue Musketeer Suit

  • Red Musketeer Suit

  • Red Noblesse Suit

  • White Noblesse Suit

  • Red Pirate Suit

  • White Assassin Suit

  • Black Assassin Suit

  • Chevalier Suit

  • Valkyrie Suit

  • Wizard Wine Suit

docs.title: Basic Information
docs.text:
• Buffs: Temporary beneficial effects (e.g., increased stats)
  • Debuffs: Temporary harmful effects (e.g., slows, poison)

docs.title: Buff Limits
docs.text:
• Base Limit: 20 buff slots
  • Divine Inspiration Bonus: +4 slots (unlockable)
  • Total Possible: 24 buff slots

docs.title: Buff Rules
docs.text:
1. Overflow Handling:
    • New buffs remove oldest ones when limit is reached
  2. Priority System:
    • Higher-level buffs overwrite lower-level ones of same type
  3. Stacking Rules:
    • Buffs with identical effects don't stack - they override each other

docs.title: Meta Classes
docs.text: Below you'll find detailed descriptions of all major meta classes, categorized by role. Each class includes key traits to help guide your choice based on playstyle and leveling experience.

docs.title: Treasure Hunter
docs.text: Exceptional lethal damage and evasion. Strong in PvE and ambush-style PvP. - Leveling: Medium - Strengths: Evasion, Burst Damage, PvP, DM Events

docs.title: Abyss Walker
docs.text: Focuses on stealth and assassination. Balanced offensive capabilities. Treasure Hunter more preferable. - Leveling: Medium - Strengths: Critical Burst, PvP Utility

docs.title: Plainswalker
docs.text: Agile and evasive, specializing in mobility and fast attack speed. Treasure Hunter more preferable. - Leveling: Medium - Strengths: Evasion, Fast Attacks, Mobility

docs.title: Tyrant
docs.text: Versatile brawler class using fist weapons. Combines range skills with powerful close-combat combos. - Leveling: Medium - Strengths: HP, Burst Combos, PvE/PvP mix, Olympiad

docs.title: Titan
docs.text: High HP and devastating melee attacks. Performs exceptionally in PvE and boss encounters. - Leveling: Medium - Strengths: High HP, AoE Damage with Spear, Boss Killer, DM events

docs.title: Gladiator
docs.text: Skilled dual-sword fighter effective in both PvE and PvP. Strong late-game scaling with balanced melee and ranged abilities. - Leveling: Slow - Strengths: Excellent 1v1 combat, ranged attack options, high defenses, Olympiad

docs.title: Spoiler
docs.text: Specialist in spoiling monsters for rare items and adena. A must for players looking to fund crafting or economy roles. - Leveling: Slow - Strengths: Economy, Item Farming, PvE Utility

docs.title: Artisan
docs.text: Focuses on creating gear, items, and consumables for other players. Spoiler more preferable for newer players. - Leveling: Slow - Strengths: Crafting, Clan Utility, Economic Contribution

docs.title: Phantom Ranger
docs.text: Highest burst damage among archers but comes with lower durability. Hawkeye more preferable. - Leveling: Slower - Strengths: High Damage, PvP DPS

docs.title: Hawkeye
docs.text: Balanced archer with superior HP. Great for surviving longer fights. - Leveling: Slower - Strengths: Durability, Balanced Stats

docs.title: Silver Ranger
docs.text: Agile and fast-shooting, with balanced HP and excellent speed. Hawkeye more preferable. - Leveling: Slower - Strengths: Attack Speed, Mobility, Kiting

docs.title: Necromancer
docs.text: Durable mage using Transfer Pain to tank damage. Good for solo play. - Leveling: Fast - Strengths: Survivability, Debuffs, Single target PvE, Curse Death Link, Vampiric Claw

docs.title: Spellsinger
docs.text: Fast-casting water magic specialist. Effective in both PvP and PvP. Sustains HP by Battle Heal. - Leveling: Fast - Strengths: Casting Speed, PvE Efficiency

docs.title: Sorcerer
docs.text: Fire mage with balanced casting speed and powerful AoE spells. Sustains HP by Battle Heal. Spellsinger more preferable. - Leveling: Fast - Strengths: AoE Damage, Versatility

docs.title: Spellhowler
docs.text: Dark magic user with slow casting but high magical damage potential. Low Maximum HP. - Leveling: Fast - Strengths: PvE beast, great sustain due to Vampiric Claw in trains, Curse Death Link

docs.title: Bishop
docs.text: The best healer class in the game. Good for group PvE & PvP content. - Leveling: Slow - Strengths: Healing, Resurrection, Party Support

docs.title: Warlord
docs.text: Stunner / Stop party for PvP and Sieges. - Leveling: Slow - Strengths: Stun, High HP

docs.title: Dominator
docs.text: Clan support mage that shines in group play. Not ideal for solo players. - Leveling: Slow - Strengths: Clan Buffs, Ally Support, Mass PvP Utility: Debuffs, Olympiad

docs.title: ⚙️ Grade Level Requirements
docs.text: Grade Tier Minimum Level No-Grade Lv1+ D-Grade Lv20+ C-Grade Lv40+ B-Grade Lv52+ A-Grade Lv61+ S-Grade Lv76+

docs.title: 🚀 Quick Tips
docs.text: • Maria, GM Shop

docs.title: 🛒 GM Shop & Buffer
docs.text: Locate Maria in towns: /target Maria Custom server NPC with buffs & gear Offers consumables, exchanges, and services

docs.title: 🎒 Essentials to Carry
docs.text: Scroll of Escape HP/MP Potions Soulshots/Blessed Spiritshots Available at Maria's Shop

docs.title: 🔄 Class Changes
docs.text:
• Free 1st & 2nd class changes
  • Access via medal icon (bottom-right corner)

docs.title: 🎯 Early Game
docs.text:
• Skip quests → focus on mob grinding
  • Conserve Mana Potions (expensive)

docs.title: 🏆 Mid Game
docs.text:
• Lv20/40: Redeem Shadow Weapons (Maria/Giran)
  • Lv52: Rent B-Grade (Giran Weapons Trader)

docs.title: 🔮 Buff System
docs.text:
Book Required Level Cost Max Slots Modern (Lv52) 52 400K Adena +1 Original (Lv62) 62 7 Medals +1 Manuscript (Lv76) 76 10 Medals +1 Original Ver. (Lv76) 76 15 Medals +1

Learn them at your class trainer

docs.title: 💰 Spending Priority
docs.text:
1. Weapons (highest priority)
  2. Armor/Gear
  3. Dyes (Maria's Shop)

docs.title: 🎁 Progression Boosters
docs.text:
• Vote for server rewards → Voting Guide
  • Avoid pet leveling (inefficient)
  • Buy Strider if you need mobility (Maria → Event Items)

docs.title: 🤖 Maria Macro
docs.text:
/target Maria  
/attack
Macro Tutorial

docs.title: Levels 12-25
docs.text:
• 12-18: Ruins of Despair - Gludio
  • 15-20: Ruins of Agony - Gludio
  • 20-25: Abandoned Camp - Gludin
    • Kill outside, inside, or on mountain lines
    • ⚠️ Might be crowded on launch

docs.text:

    • Hills & mountain spots available
    • ⚠️ Might be crowded
  • 27-33:
    • Forgotten Temple - Gludin
    • Ant Nest - Gludio
    • Higher HP mobs deeper inside
    • ⚠️ Tough & crowded area

docs.text:

  • 40-51:
    • Cruma Tower - Gludio

docs.text:

  • 50-55: Cemetary - Aden

docs.text:

  • 55-64: Fields of Massacre - Aden

docs.text:

docs.title: Levels 63-69
docs.text:
• 63-69: Beast Farm - Rune

    • Good A-grade recipe spoils
    • Feed animals with food from nearby NPCs to evolve them
    • Recipe Locations:
      • DC Helmet: Alpen Buffalo
      • DC Boots: Alpen Buffalo
      • Tallum Helmet: Alpen Buffalo
      • Tallum Boots: Alpen Kookaburra

  • 63-69: Forest of the Dead - Rune

    • Hiding Behind the Truth Quest Chain (B Grade Jewels):

      1. 63: Tragedy in von Hellman Forest
      2. 64: Lidia's Heart
      3. 65: Inhabitants of the Forest of the Dead
      4. 66: Hiding Behind The Truth

    • Final Rewards Choice:

      • Meet Lidia:
        • 1x Earring of Blessing
        • 2x Ring of Blessing
      • Meet Hardin:
        • 1x Necklace of Blessing
        • 1x Earring of Blessing

    • Necromancer's Request Quest

docs.text:

docs.title: Levels 65-75

docs.text:

docs.title: Quest Exchanges
docs.text:
• The Zero Hour Quest

    Item Fangs of Stakato 1 Enria 12 1 Asofe 6 1 Thons 6 10 Varnish of Purity 81 5 Synthetic Cokes 33 10 Compound Braids 30 10 Durable Metal Plate 150 10 Mithril Alloy 131 5 Oriharukon 123

  • Seductive Whispers Quest

    Winning Rounds - Adena Reward Additional Rewards 1 - 40.000 - 2 - 80.000 - 3 - 110.000 D-Grade Enchant Weapon Scroll 4 - 199.000 C-Grade Enchant Weapon Scroll 5 - 388.000 B-Grade Recipe 6 - 675.000 B-Grade Weapon Key Material 7 - 1.284.000 2x B-Grade Enchant Weapon Scrolls,2x B-Grade Enchant Armor Scrolls 8 - 2.384.000 1x A-Grade Enchant Weapon Scroll,2x A-Grade Enchant Armor Scrolls

  • Ice Merchant Quest

    Material Cost (Crystals) Crafted Leather 23 Silver Ice Crystals Coarse Bone Powder 6 Silver Ice Crystals Steel 8 Silver Ice Crystals EWA Scroll 18 Black Ice Crystals EAA Scroll 240 Black Ice Crystals EWB Scroll 500 Black Ice Crystals EAB Scroll 80 Black Ice Crystals

  • Necromancer’s Request Quest

    Material Zombie Brains Required Mold Lubricant 42 Enria 32 Mold Hardener 62 Adamantite Nugget 13

Do Noblesse and Subclass Quests as soon as possible, they are major milestones in your character's progression. Common misconception is that subclass quests give some sort of passive or active skills for Main Class, they don't in Interlude.

For Subclass Quest, you don't need to stab Baium (Buy Pipette Knife at Maria) and you don't need a Top B-Grade Weapon, you can skip that part for later.

docs.title: Lineage II: A World of War
docs.text: Lineage II is a high-fantasy MMORPG where players battle for dominance in a chaotic, war-torn world. Your character is a weapon—forge their strength, ally with clans, and shape history through conquest, politics, and siege warfare.

docs.title: Key Features
docs.text:
• Class-Driven Combat: Choose from 5-7 races (Humans, Elves, Orcs, etc.) and 30+ classes with unique skill trees.
  • Real-Time PvP & PK System: Fight players or monsters in fast-paced combat with consequences for aggression.
  • Clan Sieges: Lead epic castle battles for territory control, taxes, and exclusive rewards
  • Group-Centric Gameplay: Buffs and class roles make teamwork essential for survival.

docs.title: Clan Sieges
docs.text:
• Goal: Capture castles to control territories, impose taxes, and unlock rare perks.
  • Dynamics: Real-time strategy with siege weapons, clan alliances, and evolving tactics.
  • Rewards: Castle Lords gain Wyvern mounts, crafting monopolies, and political influence.

Your choices write history - conquer alone or rally a clan to dominance.

docs.title: Overview
docs.text:
Access your macros by pressing the R key. Macros enable you to create and execute predefined sequences of actions.

Warning

Do not automate the macros with coins or other software, it can lead to a ban.

Supported Content:

  • All slash (/) commands
  • All chat symbols and commands

docs.title: Variable Substitutions
docs.text: Variable Description %target Displays name of current target %self Displays your character's name %pet Displays your pet's name %party1-%party8 Displays party member names (slots 1-8)

docs.title: Basic Commands
docs.text:
Delay Command:

/delay [time_in_seconds]

  • Pauses macro execution for specified duration
  • Example: /delay 2 waits 2 seconds

Character Actions:

  • /sit - Sit down
  • /stand - Stand up
  • /sitstand - Toggle sitting/standing

Tip: Drag action icons directly into the macro editor instead of typing commands.

docs.title: Chat Commands
docs.text: Prefix Channel # Party chat @ Clan chat $ Alliance chat ! Area chat + Buy/Sell chat

docs.title: Shortcut Commands
docs.text:
Regular Shortcut:

/useshortcut [container] [slot]

  • Example: /useshortcut 1 3 uses slot 3 in container 1

Forced Shortcut:

/useshortcutforce [container] [slot]

  • Equivalent to Ctrl+Click on the shortcut

docs.title: Skill Commands
docs.text:
Regular Skill Use:

/useskill [skillName]

  • Example: /useskill Windstrike

Forced Skill Use:

/useskillforce [skillName]

  • Equivalent to Ctrl+Click on the skill

docs.title: Name Colors & Their Meanings
docs.text: Color Meaning Consequences Normal (White) Neutral (non-aggressive) No penalties. Purple Player has attacked someone (aggressor) Can be attacked without penalty by others. Red Player has killed someone (PKer) High-risk status, can drop items

docs.title: Drop Penalty
docs.text:
• When you reach a certain PK count, on death you can drop your items while being Red.
    • On Signature, this is 6.

docs.title: Reducing Karma
docs.text:
• Hunt monsters for experience to reduce Karma or die.
  • When you reach 0 Karma Points, you are no longer Red.

docs.title: Reducing PK
docs.text:
• Repent Your Sins Quest
    • When you level up Sin Eater Pet and hand it to Black Judge, it will reduce your PK points, allowing you to kill again up to a certain point without drop penalty.

Tip: Avoid unnecessary PKing unless you’re prepared for consequences!

docs.title: How to Become a Hero
docs.text:
1. Compete in monthly PvP events (Olympiad)
  2. Earn the most points in your class
  3. Ties go to the most active fighter

docs.title: Match Structure
docs.text:
• 45 sec preparation time
  • 3 min battle time
  • HP/MP/CP reset before start
  • All buffs, debuffs, and pets removed on arrival
  • Servitors stay but lose buffs

Win condition: Kill opponent OR deal more damage

Restrictions

  • Only main class allowed (no subclasses)
  • Requires 1+ Olympiad point to participate
  • Limited consumables permitted (spiritshots & soulshots)
  • No teleport/recall skills
  • Disconnection = automatic loss
  • Server crash = null match

docs.title: Olympiad Points System
docs.text:
• Start with 18 points per period
  • Gain +3 weekly
  • Winners steal points from losers

End of Period Exchange

If you have more than 50 points at period end:

Exchange Rate: 1 Olympiad Point = 1,000 Noblesse Gate Passes

(Minimum 50 points required to exchange)

C4 Patch Notes C5 Patch Notes Hero

docs.title: Noblesse – How to Unlock and What You Get
How To Get Noblesse
docs.text:
1. Reach level 75 on your subclass.
  2. Complete all Possessor of a Precious Soul quests. (Parts I–IV)
  3. Unlock: Once done, you become Noblesse on both main and subclass.

Noblesse Quests

Part IPart IIPart IIIPart IV

Start NPC: Talien (Aden, Temple)

Requirements:

  • Subclass Level 50
  • 1 Hellfire Oil, 5 Lunaragents

Noblesse: Part I

Supplier of Reagents

Start NPC: Master Virgil (Rune, Temple)

Requirements:

  • Subclass Level 60
  • Noblesse Part I

Noblesse: Part II

Start NPC: Caradine (Goddard)

Requirements:

  • Subclass Level 65
  • Noblesse Part I, II

Noblesse: Part III

Start NPC: Caradine (Goddard)

Requirements:

  • Subclass Level 75
  • Noblesse Part I, II, III

Noblesse: Part IV

docs.title: What You Get With Noblesse
docs.text:
• Custom Titles

    Choose any title (no clan required)

    Use command: /nick title

  • Noblesse Tiara

    Special untradeable headgear

    Tiara Preview

  • Teleports

    Access secret spots (like dungeon interiors)

    C4 Map

    C5 Map

  • Battle Reports (Clan Leaders only)

    Track team kills, deaths, and positions during sieges.

    Refreshes every 30 seconds.

    Use command: /clanwarstatus

  • Monument of Heroes

    Displays your raid / siege history in every town

  • PvP Boost

    Deal extra damage in PvP fights

docs.title: Noblesse Skills (Use Spirit/Soul Ores)
docs.text:
Skill Effect Cost Blessing of Noblesse Keep buffs after death 5 Spirit Ore Summon CP Potion Get 20 top CP potions 80 Soul Ore Strider Siege Assault Strong strider attack on castle walls 5 Spirit Ore Advanced HQ Double HP for siege HQs 300 C-Grade Gemstones Wyvern Aegis Max magic defense (while mounted) 20 Spirit Ore Fortune of Noblesse Party gets Lucky Charm effect 4 Lucky Charm (A)

Combo Spells (Group Casts)

  • Harmony of Noblesse: 4 wizards = 2 × Elemental Assault
  • Symphony of Noblesse: 8 wizards = 4 × Elemental Assault
C4 Patch Notes

docs.title: General Info
docs.text:
Subclasses are a major milestone in your character's progression. If you finish the subclass quests, you're eligible to unlock a new class on the same character that starts from level 40, allowing you to switch classes.

Quick Start

Talk to the appropriate Class Master in your village to switch between your main class and any subclass you've unlocked.

docs.title: Quests
docs.text:
To unlock your subclass, complete the following quests:

  • Fate's Whisper
    • Hallate - Tower of Insolence - (3rd floor)
    • Kernon - Tower of Insolence - (8th floor)
    • Golkonda - Tower of Insolence - (11th floor)
  • Mimir's Elixir

docs.title: Subclass Mechanics
docs.text:
• Switching classes removes active buffs and symbol skills.

  • The following information is retained between main and subclass:

    • PvP/PK count
    • Clan and siege info
    • Recommendations and votes
    • Friends and party
    • Seven Signs progress
    • Quest progress
    • Inventory & Warehouse

Note

Weight penalties still apply, and you may become overloaded after switching classes.

docs.title: Subclass Limits
docs.text:
• Level up a subclass to 75 to unlock two more.
  • There’s no cooldown or limit on how often you can switch.
  • Subclasses are required to unlock:
    • Noblesse
    • Olympiad participation requires Noblesse

docs.title: Subclass Selection Interactive Table
docs.text:
Your main class is the selected one, the cell turns grey if you can't have that subclass.

Human Elf Dark Elf Orc Dwarf Dark Avenger Temple Knight Shillien Knight Destroyer Warsmith Paladin Swordsinger Bladedancer Tyrant Bounty Hunter Treasure Hunter Plainswalker Abyss Walker Overlord Hawkeye Silver Ranger Phantom Ranger Warcryer Warlock Elemental Summoner Phantom Summoner Sorcerer Spellsinger Spellhowler Necromancer Elven Elder Shillien Elder Warlord Gladiator Bishop

Warning

You must subclass twice before subclassing Kamael Inspector.

docs.title: Too Many Attempts or No Email Received
docs.text:
Send a private message to @Seriel, @GiN or @Astaroth

Fill this message with the appropriate information and choose which error you are facing: 

Hey! 
Unable to login after too many tries / not getting e-mail for authentication. (choose one)
- My email address: ...
- My IPv4: ...

Thank you.

docs.title: Forgot Master Account Password
docs.text:
Go to the website and fill out your email.

You will receive a link to create a new password via email.

If you don't know your e-mail:

  • Make a new Master Account and make a ticket

Or

  • Send an e-mail to info@l2reborn.org, include all identifiable information & issue.

docs.title: Forgot In-Game Account Password
docs.text:
1. Go to the website
  2. Select the appropriate server
  3. Click the … on the Account you would like reset the password for
  4. Reset Password

docs.title: Recent Installation
docs.text:
Please make sure that you have the newest version of the client.

If you have downloaded from MEGA, Google Drive, Medafire etc...

  • Those clients are not up-to-date and will not let you login.
Delete the system folder and click Repair. Folder is inside ~\Reborn\games\(insert server)\system

docs.title: Quick Links
docs.text: Server Rules  Changelogs  Launcher  Login

docs.title: Adventure Awaits
docs.text:
Reborn is one of the most popular private servers for several versions of Lineage 2 with no pay to win, no wipes and no dual-box.

It started in 2019 October 31 by a group of enthusiasts with the goal of providing a vanilla and plain experience to bring back childhood memories.

First time playing? Here's everything you need to get started:

docs.title: Install
docs.text:
1. Install the Launcher
  2. After launcher installs, press “Download” on which server you'd like to play on.
  3. Once finished downloading, press “Play”

If there's an issue during the Download, try restarting your Router, or use Mobile Data / VPN.

For any other issue, please refer to the Help & Support page.

docs.title: Account Registration
docs.text:
1. Create a Master Account
    • Your Master Account holds all of your in–game accounts.
  2. Create an In-Game Account
    • Choose "Manage Account" the server you would like to play on.
    • Press Create Account
    • Choose a random prefix from the list.
    • Your in-game username will look like: eg_example123

Referral codes are not implemented at the moment.

docs.title: Login
docs.text:
Warning

Make sure to login with your in-game account's username and not your email.

Do not share the l2reborn_easylogin.ini file with anyone, it contains your passwords.

You don’t have to do fill out your account details every time, use “Login Easy Manager” in the bottom right corner.

All the servers you see are essentially proxies that connect to the same game server, it's just for better connectivity, choose either a Proxy closest to you or the Main server.

  • The server is in France.

If you wish to play on the Seasonal Servers, choose from the [NEW] servers.

If nothing happens after you pressed “OK”, you might have taken too long or the proxy is down.

  • Try another proxy by going into the login menu again.

docs.title: You are all set!
docs.text:
It's time to create your character now, I hope you enjoy your your journey.

Don't forget to vote, every server has VIP runes which increases your rates.

  • Free VIP lasts for 12 hours (real-time) and can be acquirable again from the website after the rune expires.
  • Bought VIP last longer and may contain cosmetics.
  • They increase the rates the same way and don’t stack, but consider supporting the project!

Check out my other guides and rules for navigating around the world of Aden.

Good luck & have fun!

docs.title: How to report Dual-Box / Bot?
docs.text:
Warning

Never warn suspects - it compromises investigations.

  1. Target the player, in ALT + C select "Auto Hunting Report" (If available)

  2. Contact Staff on Discord and include the suspects' nicknames and server name.

    • EU Daytime: Message @ginreborn or @astarothreborn
    • EU Late Night: Message @serielreborn (Times based on Germany time-zone)
    Hello! "Thomas and "Charles might be dualboxing on Main Eternal.

  3. If they don't respond, open a ticket

    • Include: Time & time zone, server, nicknames.
      • Upload images and videos with imgur.com + streamable.com and share the public link.

Auto Hunting Report is not a live report, it sends the report to database for checking it out later.

Mention nicknames and server name.

docs.title: Rules applicable on all L2Reborn Servers
docs.text:
Read Carefully

These rules apply to all L2Reborn servers.

Violations may lead to penalties including suspensions or bans.

docs.title: 1. Botting
docs.text:
The use of automation tools is strictly prohibited.

Only in-game macros (via the Macro system) are allowed.

You are not allowed to use third-party programs (e.g. L2Hub HUD)

Use files only from the folders provided in your client's plugins folder.

docs.title: 2. AFK Farming
docs.text:
• AFK Farming is not allowed.

  • You must be at the computer to solve captchas.

docs.title: 3. Dualboxing
docs.text:
• Dualboxing is not allowed.
  • ONE person may control only ONE character at a time per server.
    • Using multiple devices to play multiple characters is also forbidden.
    • This also means that you cannot use multiple devices to set up shops or send items to yourself.
      • Use the Mail System or Freight Service if on the same account, to transfer.
  • Multiple people on the same network are permitted as long as:
    • Each person controls only one character
    • Each person is able to solve captchas

docs.title: 4. Real Money Trading (RMT)
docs.text:
Exchanging in-game items, services, characters, or accounts for real money is strictly prohibited.

Warning

You are not allowed to use Reborn Coins either for any exchange.

docs.title: 5. Exploits
docs.text:
• Any bugs must be reported to staff.
  • Deliberate abuse of bugs for gain will lead to penalties.

docs.title: 6. Scamming
docs.text:
All forms of scamming are forbidden.

Includes, but NOT limited to:

  • Scamshops
    • Advertising one item but selling another (e.g., SOP/D gems).
    • Announcing low prices but charging much higher (e.g., AA for 13a but sold for 13kk).
    • Misleading package deals (e.g., sets with swapped items).
    • Craft shops with absurd material costs (e.g., 1kk per material).
  • Account theft
    • Stealing items by logging into another player’s account.

High-Value Item Clause

Severe cases of scamming involving high-value items (e.g., S-grade equipment, epic jewelry) may warrant compensation at the staff’s discretion.

docs.title: 7. Shops
docs.text:
• Refer to Rule 6 regarding scamshops.
  • Each person is allowed only ONE offline shop AND one per account:
    • Even if you have multiple accounts, you can only have 1 offline shop maximum per person.
      • Make sure that if you wish to play on a character, it's not on the same account as the offline shop.
    • If your client is active, you may also run one online shop.
  • It is allowed to have an offline shop used by: .offline while farming on another account.
  • Essence, Eternal, H5 Forever are allowed to have more than one offline shop, but still one per account.

docs.title: 8. Playing on Multiple Servers
docs.text:
You may play on more than one L2Reborn server. However:

  • All servers’ rules apply fully.
  • Don’t use one server as an excuse for neglecting another (e.g., failing captchas).

Optimize Your Time

Setting up a shop or organizing gear on one server while farming actively on another is the best way to multi-task.

docs.title: 9. Account Sharing
docs.text:
Sharing your account is at your own risk. It is highly discouraged.

Example

Sharing your account is risky—if it gets banned or items go missing, that's on you.

docs.title: 1. Offline Farming
docs.text:
Offline farming is allowed via the in-game system.

You may not open a second client to farm actively with another character at the same time.

docs.title: 2. Mouse Macros
docs.text:
The use of mouse macro software is permitted despite the general prohibition in Rule 1.

Use of generic auto-clickers or random macro software is not permitted.

docs.title: 3. Griefing is Prohibited
docs.text:
Any actions considered "griefing" are not allowed.

See: Changelog Essence-66 for more details.

Resources

  • Server Rules

docs.title: How to open a ticket?
docs.text:
If you have a problem related to bans, account, game, donations, bug or abuse:

  • You can open a ticket by clicking this link

  • Upload images, videos with imgur.com + streamable.com and share the public link

  • You will get a response here and click on the appropriate ticket.

Category What to Provide All Tickets - Account + Character Name(s) Donation Issues - Payment Method (CC/FreeKassa/Crypto)- Transaction ID (Hash for crypto) - Payment Email + Date/Time- Full details (Bought 1st class for "Bob) Twitch - Twitch Username + Stream Schedule IP Sharing - No ticket needed — Just play and follow server rules.

Warning

Tickets that do not include all the necessary information may be closed without further notice.

docs.title: Ticket Response Times
docs.text:
• We handle tickets as soon as possible in the order they're received.
  • Please avoid follow-ups to let us work efficiently.

For Best Results

  • Be patient - we process tickets in order
  • Include all details in your initial submission
  • Wait at least 48 hours before follow-ups

docs.title: How to Submit a Ticket Properly
docs.text: Click the GIF to enlarge

docs.title: Why do I have to worry about Account Security?
docs.text:
Reborn sets up systems and rules to protect players, but we're not responsible for players' actions in or out of the game.

Your account is your responsibility

Never share your password or l2reborn_easylogin.ini file, even with staff members.

l2reborn_easylogin.ini contains all of your passwords.

Scam Protection

  • Report all scams - Staff will ban the scammers.
  • 2FA + Lock required to:
    • See scammer details
    • Recover lost epic/high-value items

docs.title: Enable 2FA
docs.text:
Activate two-factor authentication on the L2Reborn website.

Link

docs.title: About 2FA
docs.text:
2FA generates a temporary code from your phone when logging into the website.

Essential for account security.

docs.title: Use the Lock System
docs.text:
Locked characters can't trade, sell, modify items or PK.

Commands:

  • .setlockpw pin - will set pin code to lock & unlock
  • .lock pin - enables protection
  • .unlock pin - disables protection

docs.title: Reset Lock System
docs.text:
Requirements

Enable 2FA first.

  • Visit Game Accounts
  • Click Overview on the account
  • Click ⋯ and Unlock

docs.title: Use Unique Passwords
docs.text: Use different passwords for different accounts (master, email, servers)

docs.title: Never Share Sensitive Information
docs.text: Keep your in-game goods and account details private.

docs.title: Captcha System
docs.text:
• During gameplay you will encounter Captchas:

    • "Letter" captcha (hit 3 letters correct consecutively)
    • "Anti-bot" captcha (small math by addition)

    It's normal that you encounter them, GMs use these tools to uphold fair play.

    Automatic captchas on fail don't ban, all bans are done manually.

docs.title: Summary
docs.text:
• You are the first line of defense.
  • No one, not friends or staff, needs your password.
  • Stay skeptical, if something feels off, it probably is.
Staff Impersonators Password Cracking Times

docs.title: Resources
docs.text:
• Trojan Horse
  • Computer Viruses
  • Phishing
  • Social Engineering

docs.title: Maximum Characters Reached
docs.text:
Login with the last character you logged.

So if you were on Account A and wish to log Account B, you must first log-in with Account A.

Video

Error Message

docs.title: Server Selection Stuck
docs.text: Try another proxy by going into login menu again, and connect to another proxy.

docs.title: Camera Sensitivity
docs.text: Fine-tune your DPI in your mouse software.

docs.title: Tree Flickering
docs.text: Put shader to off and reflections to sky instead of all. Thanks @Csilk

docs.title: Unresponsive Buttons Fix
docs.text:
This solution fixes the buttons not working for Monster Data / Spoil / Reborn Store etc..

Delete windowsinfo.ini and option.ini and repair.

They're found in: \Reborn\games\signature\system\

docs.title: Small Texts and Buttons on 4k Monitor
docs.text:
Enter fullscreen mode, and lower resolution.

Sadly there are no other solutions. On 2K the buttons are good, beyond that unuseable.

docs.title: Event Code 10/5
docs.text:
This happens when there is either an interruption in your connection and/or an interruption to the SmartGuard service.

Power-cycle your Modem/Router/Switch. If that doesn't work: Delete the System folder & do Client Repair.

docs.title: smrt64.exe Error
docs.text: Restart your PC.

docs.title: Ultimate Fix Summary
docs.text:
Try all steps, what you've tested, and share your results in Discord if the issue continues

Please make sure that:

  • You are using Windows 10 or 11.
  • Your Windows copy is legitimate and not run in a virtual environment. No debug/insider version.
  • Reborn files (l2.exe) and folders are added as exceptions/exclusions in your antivirus and firewall settings.
  • ESET/BitDefender/Kaspersky/McAfee/Malwarebytes/Avast/AVG anti-viruses
    • Don't care about your settings, uninstall them to run L2.
  • If you’re using a touchpad, note that it may be blocked; please use a mouse instead.
  • If you get stuck at the proxy selection screen, go back into the login menu again and select another proxy.
  • Ensure you have the latest Visual C++ Redistributable for x86 installed.
  • Your drivers are up-to-date.
  • You are logging in with your in-game account's username (e.g. le_lenny13) and not your Master Account's email.

Additionally try:

  • Reinstalling .NET frameworks or Enable them, click on drop down and tick the options below as well.
  • Restarting your router
  • Restarting your computer
  • Disabling Riot's Vanguard, and other anti-cheats.
    • Here's how to play League with L2
  • Deleting your system folder and repairing your files.
  • Disabling all overlay extensions: Discord, Overwolf etc..

docs.title: Do Linux & MacOS operating systems work?
docs.text:
Does not work on Reborn servers – SmartGuard (anti-cheat) only supports Windows 10/11.

M1/M2 Macs (Apple Silicon) are NOT supported.

Only works on Intel-based Macs with a Windows partition (via Boot Camp).

docs.title: Does Cloud Gaming work?
docs.text: No, keyboard presses through streaming software don't work.

docs.title: Do virtual systems work?
docs.text: No, SmartGuard (anti-cheat) prevents this.

docs.title: Does Steam Deck work?
docs.text:
Yes, it does. You need to download Windows: tutorial.

Key remap softwares: reWASD or SWICD

Thanks for the video @royce6735 !

docs.title: Launcher doesn't load
docs.text:
• Upgrade your graphic drivers and restart your computer.
  • If that does not work: restart your router and computer.

docs.title: Discord Permissions Fix
docs.text: If you can't see certain discord channels, assign yourself the Origins role.

docs.title: Missing Account on Website
docs.text:
Make sure that you are not on the correct Master Account.

  • If you are: Exit the Account and clear the cookies and refresh.

docs.title: Setup / Windows Installer Fail
docs.text: Reinstall .NET frameworks, or enable them in Turn Windows features on or off.

docs.title: How to play Riot's games?
docs.text:
1. Open L2.
  2. Open Riot Launcher.
  3. Exit Vanguard
  4. Click Start on Riot Launcher.

docs.title: VPN Recommendation
docs.text: Cloudflare Warp

docs.title: Invalid SafeAuth
docs.text:
Save l2reborn_easylogin.ini file to Desktop, it contains your passwords.

  • Put it back in System folder after the install is done and don't share that file. Ever.

Delete your System folder and do Repair.

docs.title: Client Red Error
docs.text: Close Updater, delete that file that has problem, re-launch Updater.

docs.title: 0301 CDEF0007
docs.text:
1. Method 1: Uninstall the Latest Update (for Minor Updates)

  2. Open Settings → Press Win + I

  3. Go to Update & Security → Windows Update

  4. Click View update history

  5. Select Uninstall updates

  6. Find the most recent update, select it, and click Uninstall

  7. Restart your computer

Credit: @mefox_ @abeisede

docs.title: 0301 CDEF0002
docs.text: Make sure you have Windows 10/11 and no 'Insider Mode' or other Beta/Debug features enabled. Might require fresh Windows install with formatting PC.

docs.title: 0301 0000135 / 0xc0000135
docs.text:
• Download and Run: All in One VC Redistributables
  • Latest Windows 11 version might not be supported by SmartGuard, wait ~3 days for SmartGuard to catch up or revert the update.
  • You are not missing a file.

docs.title: 0301 CDEF001
docs.text: Disable system's debug mode: here

docs.title: 0301 000001B1
docs.text: Try everything from here

docs.title: 0xc000041d
docs.text:
Anti-virus is blocking Smartguard

Uninstall the anti-virus (AVG, ESET ...) or add L2Reborn/Smartguard files/folders as Anti-virus Exceptions. Antiviruses can disregard exceptions, uninstalling is recommended.

docs.title: 0xC0000005
docs.text: Restart your computer.

docs.title: 0301 CDEF000 / 0301 C000007B
docs.text: Turn Core Isolation off and restart your PC.

docs.title: 0301 0000041D
docs.text: It seems like this error comes from new AMI BIOS + Driver updates, roll them back.

docs.title: SmartGuard stuck loading
docs.text:
Reboot your PC and Router.

  • Temporary fix: Use a VPN or Mobile Data to connect.

docs.title: I tried everything from above
docs.text: If you are still having issues after Ultimate Fix Summary and the above posts, check out this page or let us know in the Discord.
